# Capybara Clicker 2 - The Ultimate Idle Game Portal

This portal features **Capybara Clicker 2** as the main, root-level game along with a collection of curated idle and clicker games.

## Games Collection
- **Capybara Clicker 2 (Home)**: Click to multiply your capybara population, unlock cute skins, buy upgrades, and rule your capybara empire directly on the homepage.
- **Cookie Clicker**: Bake billions of cookies, hire grandmas, build cookie farms, and establish a global baking monopoly.
- **Chill Guy Clicker**: Generate vibes by clicking the relaxed pup, purchase cozy lo-fi beats, coffee, and sunglasses upgrades.
- **Italian Brainrot Clicker**: Click the buff Italian goose to accumulate brainrot and unlock viral meme characters.

## Features
- **Responsive Design**: All games are optimized for mobile and desktop screens.
- **Auto-Save Support**: Progress is saved automatically to browser local storage so you can safely resume playing anytime.
- **Standalone Experience**: Dedicated standalone game page configurations with clean navigation panels and header pills.

## Crawling & Access
- **AI Crawling**: Fully allowed.
- **Sitemap**: Available at `/sitemap.xml`.
